application_policy: Apply the full template method as defaults. User project ideas, supplied assets, copy, brand constraints, and compliance requirements override these defaults.

timeline_model_60s.purpose: Juxtapose miracle and destruction before the main action starts.
timeline_model_60s.duration_guidance: 1.2-3.0s, steady enough to establish mythic pressure

timeline_model_60s.purpose: Drag the viewer from macro narrative into claustrophobic body sensation.
timeline_model_60s.duration_guidance: 0.8-2.0s with at least one tactile rapid insert

timeline_model_60s.purpose: Collide mechanical overload with subjective fear until all images converge on a concrete threshold.
timeline_model_60s.duration_guidance: 0.6-1.2s rapid-cut cluster, then one threshold insert

timeline_model_60s.editing_logic: hard cut from extreme motion to extreme stillness
timeline_model_60s.purpose: Break expectation after the threshold and open the flow-state dimension.

timeline_model_60s.editing_logic: surreal long takes with negative space
timeline_model_60s.purpose: Let the subject merge with a larger order; end with calm control rather than explanation.

three_act_pressure_model.core_logic: Use restrained pacing and fatalistic images to establish danger before the action begins.
three_act_pressure_model.visual_logic: backlit silhouette, destruction/glory concept montage, cold preparation-space wide, visor or face close-up, physical lock/snap as the rhythm trigger
three_act_pressure_model.audio_logic: close calm VO stays forward; environment remains restrained with low room tone, distant crowd, fire crackle, metal debris, and one sharp lock click

three_act_pressure_model.core_logic: Release pressure through jump cuts, extreme speed shots, macro textures, and subjective/objective cross-cutting.
three_act_pressure_model.visual_logic: rain spray, low tracking speed, airflow streaks, carbon-fiber or metal macro texture, heat shimmer, POV, tense face, mirror ghost, redline threshold
three_act_pressure_model.audio_logic: engine or machine roar, gearbox scream, gear bite, wind pressure, rain, tactile friction, fragmented breath, warning tones; external noise battles the inner VO

three_act_pressure_model.core_logic: Drop from physical speed into spiritual slowness; rebuild space into a surreal flow-state order.
three_act_pressure_model.visual_logic: slow-motion hair or head movement, sparks, ghosted formations, storm-eye wide, cloud-road, black void control gesture, orbital final path
three_act_pressure_model.audio_logic: abrupt silence drop after threshold; keep deep space low-frequency bed, calm breath, and minimal resonance while mechanical roar disappears

audio_design_model.principle: Subjective sound field and environmental sound field fight for control: close calm VO versus violent machinery, then a silence drop into flow state.
audio_design_model.subjective_voice: close-mic, calm, low, intimate VO or breath; dialogue copy stays in audio/SRT files, not in video model prompts
pressure_curve: restrained low-frequency bed in the opening
rapidly rising mechanical and tactile SFX during overload
fragmented breath and warning tones near redline
abrupt cut to near-silence at the threshold
deep space tone and controlled breath in the flow-state ending
audio_design_model.music_policy: Do not ask video models to generate per-clip background music; music belongs to whole-film post-production.

transition_rules: Use hard cuts in pressure clusters.
Use silence, visual expansion, or slowed motion at the flow-state turn.
Avoid decorative transitions that reduce the pressure.
